positive: A minimalist, abstract scene featuring a stylized golden retriever silhouette leaping joyfully through a field of luminous neon lavender flowers at sunset. The design should have a strong, clean, solid silhouette against a contrasting gradient background of deep indigo and soft peach. Use negative space effectively, making the dog's motion the central focus. Style: modern flat illustration meets Japanese woodblock print aesthetic, high contrast, vector art quality, vibrant yet sophisticated color palette, designed for textile printing, centered composition, clean edges, perfectly symmetrical balance.
